specs.title: cp-000: Image export

cp-009: CmdY CmdShiftZ redoes

cp-012: CmdShiftV toggles the visualize popover

cp-014: Only activates when not in an editable text target
cp-015: slides loads decks via getUserDecks and normalizes missing fields to fallback va

cp-019: Primary create CTA label on slides is Create New
cp-020: Import CTA label on slides is Import Presentation

cp-022: Import accepts pptx extension and PowerPoint MIME type through the native file i
cp-023: Import preview is rendered inline on the page beneath the header rather than in
cp-024: Import state card remains visible whenever importPhase idle or a previewerror ex

cp-027: Import phase copy changes between parsing ready importing and idle-with-error st

cp-029: Active import chip shows a spinning CircleNotch completed chip shows a static do
